zh.lifeSummary: Felicia de Longchamp於1250年出生在英國英格蘭爾麗頓 白 內斯頓。她於1274年與John de la Brookes I在英國英格蘭爾麗頓 白 內斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Felicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Felix . It was popular in Britain in the medieval period (with the vernacular forms Felice , Felis ), but by the 16th century it had become confused with Phyllis . In modern times it is in only occasional use.

en.lifeSummary: Felicia de Longchamp was born in 1250, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John de la Brookes I in 1274, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Felicia de Longchamp(은)는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 John de la Brookes I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
